content.query:
SELECT TOP (10) *
 FROM [dim].[pos_sensitive_codes_v]
 where type = 'Procedure' ;

drop table appl.tmp;
  select top 10 cast(token as NVARCHAR) as token, cast(CLAIM_NUM as NVARCHAR) as CLAIM_NUM, cast(CLAIM_LINE_NUM as NVARCHAR) as CLAIM_LINE_NUM
  , cast(SETTING_OF_CARE as NVARCHAR) as SETTING_OF_CARE, cast(CLAIM_TYPE as NVARCHAR) as CLAIM_TYPE 
  into appl.tmp 
  from customer.stg_incr_claims3_t where SETTING_OF_CARE in (select distinct substring(code, 1, 3) as code from [dim].[type_of_bill_sensitive_codes_v]);

select * from appl.tmp;

select 
t1.code, case when t1.code <> '' then null else c.[SETTING_OF_CARE] end as [new_CD], c.*
from appl.tmp c
  left join (select distinct substring(code, 1, 3) as code from [dim].[type_of_bill_sensitive_codes_v]) t1
  on 
    c.[CLAIM_TYPE] = 'I'
    and c.[SETTING_OF_CARE] = t1.code

 select distinct PATIENT_AGE from appl.deid_claims3_t 
 where token = '64F36ABB264B1DF4626C161F0416A071969C47D81DDF6D3511B91D073867767796C1B48F8DC424D6759C88A4EC2733D0' 
 and CLAIM_NUM = '7AC4E88BD871B53AAA6828CA0666A82A4F080FBCB06C3BBB7C18F53FFB65DE46' and CLAIM_LINE_NUM = 1

select distinct PROCEDURE_SCHEME
  from customer.stg_incr_claims3_t

select a.*, replace(a.icd_version, 'ICD', '') as n
select count(*)
from [dim].[icd_codes_t] a

select top 10 *
from 
  [customer].[stg_incr_mortality_t] a
where 
  deceased_match_indicator = 'Y' and deceased_county is null

select count(*)
from 
  [customer].[stg_incr_mortality_t] a
where 
  deceased_match_indicator = 'Y' and (date_of_death <> '' or deceased_state <> '' or deceased_county <> '')
  and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2022 and 2024)
        or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '202201' and '202403')
23108348
22539760
553159
544158

select count(*)
from 
  [appl].[deid_mortality_t] a

select top 10 *
FROM 
  [customer].[stg_incr_heii_t] a
where 
  a.Age_in_Years <> ''

select count(*)
FROM 
  [customer].[stg_incr_heii_t] a
where 
  (a.Age_in_Years <> '' or a.Probability_White <> '' or a.female <> '' or a.gender <> '' 
    or a.ST <> '' or a.state <> '' or a.zip <> '' or a.County_Name <> '' or a.City <> '' or a.FIPS_State_County <> '' 
    or a.AccidentAge <> '' or a.AddrStability <> '' or a.VerifiedSSN <> '')
23108348
14353152

select count(*)
from 
  [appl].[deid_heii_t] a
  22423759

delete from [customer].[stg_incr_claims_2_t];

delete from [customer].[stg_incr_claims_4_t];

select count(*) from [customer].[stg_incr_claims_1_t];

585694121

301775468

298932131

select top 10 * from [appl].[deid_mortality_t];
select count(*) from [appl].[deid_mortality_t];
23108348
select count(*) from [customer].[stg_incr_mortality_1_t];
23108348
select count(*) from [customer].[stg_incr_heii_1_t];

select top 10 * from [appl].[deid_heii_t] where AddrChangeCount01 <> '';
select count(*) from [appl].[deid_heii_t];
23108348
select count(*) from [customer].[stg_incr_heii_t];
23108348


select * from dbo.vTableSpaceInGB 
ORDER BY
    table_reserved_space_GB desc
;

select count(*)
from [appl].[deid_mortality_t]
where confidence_score is not null;


select count(distinct token)
from appl.claims_minor_tokens_t

select 
  a.[deceased_match_indicator]
  , case when ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2022 and 2024)
                    or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '202201' and '202403') then 'Yes'
  else 'No'
  end as valid_date
  , case when b.token is null then 'No'
  else 'Yes'
  end as minor
  , count(*) as cnt
  , sum(case when date_of_death is not null then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_populated_date_of_death
  , sum(case when verified_or_proof_code is not null then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_populated_verified_or_proof_code
  , sum(case when deceased_source is not null then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_populated_deceased_source
  , sum(case when confidence_score is not null then 1 else 0 end) as confidence_score
from 
  [customer].[stg_incr_mortality_t] a
  left join [appl].[claims_minor_tokens_t] b
  on a.input_token = b.token
group by 
  a.[deceased_match_indicator]
  , case when ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2022 and 2024)
                    or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '202201' and '202403') then 'Yes'
  else 'No'
  end
  , case when b.token is null then 'No'
  else 'Yes'
  end


select
  case when (a.st <> '' or a.female <> '' or a.gender <> '' or a.AccidentAge <> '' or a.state <> '' or a.Age_in_Years <> '' or a.zip <> '' or a.County_Name <> '' or a.FIPS_State_County <> '' or a.Probability_White <> '')
  then 'Yes'
  else 'No' end as has_heii_values,
  -- case when (a.st <> '' or a.female <> '' or a.AccidentAge <> '' )
  -- then 'Yes'
  -- else 'No' end as has_non_demo_insights_values,
  case when b.token is not null or (age_in_years <> '' and cast(a.age_in_years as float) < 18) then 'Yes' else 'No' end as is_minor
  , count(*) as cnt_tokens
  , sum(case when AddrChangeCount01<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AddrChangeCount01
  , sum(case when AddrChangeCount03<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AddrChangeCount03
  , sum(case when AddrChangeCount06<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AddrChangeCount06
  , sum(case when AddrChangeCount12<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AddrChangeCount12
  , sum(case when AddrChangeCount60<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AddrChangeCount60
  , sum(case when AddrStability<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AddrStability
  , sum(case when LifeEvEverResidedCnt<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_LifeEvEverResidedCnt
  , sum(case when HHPropCurrAVMHighest<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_HHPropCurrAVMHighest
  , sum(case when PropCurrOwnedAVMTtl<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PropCurrOwnedAVMTtl
  , sum(case when RaAPropOwnerAVMHighest<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_RaAPropOwnerAVMHighest
  , sum(case when RaAPropOwnerAVMMed<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_RaAPropOwnerAVMMed
  , sum(case when WealthIndex<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_WealthIndex
  , sum(case when CurrAddrAVMValue<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_CurrAddrAVMValue
  , sum(case when CurrAddrLenOfRes<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_CurrAddrLenOfRes
  , sum(case when EducationFieldofStudyType<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_EducationFieldofStudyType
  , sum(case when AgeNewestRecord<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AgeNewestRecord
  , sum(case when CreditBureauRecord<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_CreditBureauRecord
  , sum(case when ProspectBankingExperience<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_ProspectBankingExperience
  , sum(case when RecentActivityIndex<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_RecentActivityIndex
  , sum(case when RecentUpdate<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_RecentUpdate
  , sum(case when AssocCreditBureauOnlyCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AssocCreditBureauOnlyCount
  , sum(case when AssocCreditBureauOnlyCountMonth<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AssocCreditBureauOnlyCountMonth
  , sum(case when AssocCreditBureauOnlyCountNew<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AssocCreditBureauOnlyCountNew
  , sum(case when AssocHighRiskTopologyCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AssocHighRiskTopologyCount
  , sum(case when AssocSuspicousIdentitiesCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AssocSuspicousIdentitiesCount
  , sum(case when AssocRiskLevel<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_AssocRiskLevel
  , sum(case when ComponentCharRiskLevel<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_ComponentCharRiskLevel
  , sum(case when DivRiskLevel<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivRiskLevel
  , sum(case when IdentityRiskLevel<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_IdentityRiskLevel
  , sum(case when IDVerRiskLevel<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_IDVerRiskLevel
  , sum(case when SearchComponentRiskLevel<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SearchComponentRiskLevel
  , sum(case when SearchVelocityRiskLevel<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SearchVelocityRiskLevel
  , sum(case when SourceRiskLevel<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SourceRiskLevel
  , sum(case when SourceWatchList<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SourceWatchList
  , sum(case when ValidationRiskLevel<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_ValidationRiskLevel
  , sum(case when PRSearchAddrIdentities<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchAddrIdentities
  , sum(case when PRSearchIdentityAddrs<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchIdentityAddrs
  , sum(case when PRSearchIdentityPhones<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchIdentityPhones
  , sum(case when PRSearchIdentitySSNs<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchIdentitySSNs
  , sum(case when PRSearchLocateCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchLocateCount
  , sum(case when PRSearchLocateCount01<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchLocateCount01
  , sum(case when PRSearchLocateCount03<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchLocateCount03
  , sum(case when PRSearchLocateCount06<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchLocateCount06
  , sum(case when PRSearchLocateCount12<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchLocateCount12
  , sum(case when PRSearchLocateCount24<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchLocateCount24
  , sum(case when PRSearchOtherCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchOtherCount
  , sum(case when PRSearchOtherCount03<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchOtherCount03
  , sum(case when PRSearchOtherCount12<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchOtherCount12
  , sum(case when PRSearchPersonalFinanceCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchPersonalFinanceCount
  , sum(case when PRSearchPersonalFinanceCount12<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchPersonalFinanceCount12
  , sum(case when PRSearchPersonalFinanceCount24<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchPersonalFinanceCount24
  , sum(case when PRSearchPhoneIdentities<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchPhoneIdentities
  , sum(case when PRSearchSSNIdentities<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PRSearchSSNIdentities
  , sum(case when SearchAddrSearchCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SearchAddrSearchCount
  , sum(case when SearchPhoneSearchCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SearchPhoneSearchCount
  , sum(case when SearchSSNSearchCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SearchSSNSearchCount
  , sum(case when SearchUnverifiedAddrCountYear<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SearchUnverifiedAddrCountYear
  , sum(case when SearchUnverifiedDOBCountYear<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SearchUnverifiedDOBCountYear
  , sum(case when SearchUnverifiedPhoneCountYear<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SearchUnverifiedPhoneCountYear
  , sum(case when SearchUnverifiedSSNCountYear<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SearchUnverifiedSSNCountYear
  , sum(case when CorrelationRiskLevel<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_CorrelationRiskLevel
  , sum(case when SrcsConfirmIDAddrCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SrcsConfirmIDAddrCount
  , sum(case when VerificationFailure<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VerificationFailure
  , sum(case when VerifiedAddress<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VerifiedAddress
  , sum(case when VerifiedDOB<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VerifiedDOB
  , sum(case when VerifiedName<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VerifiedName
  , sum(case when SubjectAddrCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SubjectAddrCount
  , sum(case when SubjectAddrRecentCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SubjectAddrRecentCount
  , sum(case when SubjectSSNCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SubjectSSNCount
  , sum(case when SubjectSSNRecentCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SubjectSSNRecentCount
  , sum(case when VariationDOBCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VariationDOBCount
  , sum(case when VariationDOBCountNew<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VariationDOBCountNew
  , sum(case when VariationIdentityCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VariationIdentityCount
  , sum(case when VariationMSourcesSSNCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VariationMSourcesSSNCount
  , sum(case when VariationMSourcesSSNUnrelCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VariationMSourcesSSNUnrelCount
  , sum(case when VariationRiskLevel<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VariationRiskLevel
  , sum(case when EstimatedAnnualIncome<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_EstimatedAnnualIncome
  , sum(case when EstimatedAnnualIncome_12<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_EstimatedAnnualIncome_12
  , sum(case when EstimatedAnnualIncome_24<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_EstimatedAnnualIncome_24
  , sum(case when HHEstimatedIncomeRange<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_HHEstimatedIncomeRange
  , sum(case when ProspectEstimatedIncomeRange<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_ProspectEstimatedIncomeRange
  , sum(case when RaAMedIncomeRange<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_RaAMedIncomeRange
  , sum(case when DivAddrIdentityCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivAddrIdentityCount
  , sum(case when DivAddrIdentityCountNew<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivAddrIdentityCountNew
  , sum(case when DivAddrIdentityMSourceCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivAddrIdentityMSourceCount
  , sum(case when DivAddrSSNCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivAddrSSNCount
  , sum(case when DivAddrSSNCountNew<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivAddrSSNCountNew
  , sum(case when DivAddrSSNMSourceCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivAddrSSNMSourceCount
  , sum(case when DivAddrSuspIdentityCountNew<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivAddrSuspIdentityCountNew
  , sum(case when DivSearchAddrSuspIdentityCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivSearchAddrSuspIdentityCount
  , sum(case when InputAddrAgeNewestRecord<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrAgeNewestRecord
  , sum(case when InputAddrAgeOldestRecord<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrAgeOldestRecord
  , sum(case when InputAddrAVMValue<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrAVMValue
  , sum(case when InputAddrErrorCode<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrErrorCode
  , sum(case when InputAddrHistoricalMatch<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrHistoricalMatch
  , sum(case when InputAddrLenOfRes<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrLenOfRes
  , sum(case when InputAddrNotPrimaryRes<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrNotPrimaryRes
  , sum(case when InputAddrProblems<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrProblems
  , sum(case when InputAddrValidation<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrValidation
  , sum(case when SFDUAddrSSNCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SFDUAddrSSNCount
  , sum(case when DivSSNAddrMSourceCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivSSNAddrMSourceCount
  , sum(case when DivSSNIdentityMSourceCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivSSNIdentityMSourceCount
  , sum(case when DivSSNIdentityMSourceUrelCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivSSNIdentityMSourceUrelCount
  , sum(case when DivSSNLNameCountNew<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_DivSSNLNameCountNew
  , sum(case when IDVerSSNCreditBureauCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_IDVerSSNCreditBureauCount
  , sum(case when IDVerSSNCreditBureauDelete<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_IDVerSSNCreditBureauDelete
  , sum(case when SSNAddrCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SSNAddrCount
  , sum(case when SSNAddrRecentCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SSNAddrRecentCount
  , sum(case when SSNIdentitiesCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SSNIdentitiesCount
  , sum(case when SSNIdentitiesRecentCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SSNIdentitiesRecentCount
  , sum(case when SSNLastNameCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SSNLastNameCount
  , sum(case when SSNNotFound<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SSNNotFound
  , sum(case when SSNProblems<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SSNProblems
  , sum(case when VerifiedSSN<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VerifiedSSN
  , sum(case when BusinessInactiveAssociation<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_BusinessInactiveAssociation
  , sum(case when CurrAddrActivePhoneList<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_CurrAddrActivePhoneList
  , sum(case when InputAddrActivePhoneList<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrActivePhoneList
  , sum(case when InputAddrPhoneCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrPhoneCount
  , sum(case when InputAddrPhoneRecentCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputAddrPhoneRecentCount
  , sum(case when InputPhoneHighRisk<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputPhoneHighRisk
  , sum(case when InputPhoneMobile<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputPhoneMobile
  , sum(case when InputPhoneProblems<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputPhoneProblems
  , sum(case when InputPhoneServiceType<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputPhoneServiceType
  , sum(case when InputPhoneType<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_InputPhoneType
  , sum(case when PhoneEDAAgeNewestRecord<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PhoneEDAAgeNewestRecord
  , sum(case when PhoneEDAAgeOldestRecord<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PhoneEDAAgeOldestRecord
  , sum(case when PhoneIdentitiesCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PhoneIdentitiesCount
  , sum(case when PhoneIdentitiesRecentCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PhoneIdentitiesRecentCount
  , sum(case when PhoneOther<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PhoneOther
  , sum(case when PhoneOtherAgeNewestRecord<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PhoneOtherAgeNewestRecord
  , sum(case when PhoneOtherAgeOldestRecord<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PhoneOtherAgeOldestRecord
  , sum(case when SubjectPhoneCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SubjectPhoneCount
  , sum(case when SubjectPhoneRecentCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SubjectPhoneRecentCount
  , sum(case when VerifiedPhone<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_VerifiedPhone
  , sum(case when PrevAddrAgeNewestRecord<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PrevAddrAgeNewestRecord
  , sum(case when PrevAddrAgeOldestRecord<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PrevAddrAgeOldestRecord
  , sum(case when PrevAddrAVMValue<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_PrevAddrAVMValue
  , sum(case when SubPrimeOfferRequestCount<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SubPrimeOfferRequestCount
  , sum(case when SubPrimeOfferRequestCount12<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SubPrimeOfferRequestCount12
  , sum(case when SubPrimeOfferRequestCount24<> '' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_SubPrimeOfferRequestCount24
FROM 
  [customer].[stg_incr_heii_t] a
  left join [appl].[claims_minor_tokens_t] b
  on a.input_token = b.token
group by
  case when (a.st <> '' or a.female <> '' or a.gender <> '' or a.AccidentAge <> '' or a.state <> '' or a.Age_in_Years <> '' or a.zip <> '' or a.County_Name <> '' or a.FIPS_State_County <> '' or a.Probability_White <> '')
  then 'Yes'
  else 'No' end,
  -- case when (a.st <> '' or a.female <> '' or a.AccidentAge <> '' )
  -- then 'Yes'
  -- else 'No' end,
  case when b.token is not null or (age_in_years <> '' and cast(a.age_in_years as float) < 18) then 'Yes' else 'No' end
order by 1, 2

from [customer].[stg_incr_heii_t] a
